dependencies.name: self-contained
dependencies.purpose: .NET runtime is bundled by dotnet publish for the selected RID.

dependencies.name: SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux
dependencies.purpose: Bundled native image rendering backend used by Linux raster compatibility paths.

dependencies.name: pw-play | paplay | aplay
dependencies.purpose: Optional sound playback backend used by LinuxSoundService.

dependencies.name: autotrace
dependencies.purpose: Optional raster/vector conversion helper where configured.

dependencies.name: NetworkManager/nmcli
dependencies.purpose: Optional WiFi discovery and configuration backend.
